zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet於1226年10月10日出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特貝可爾時，她的父親Heer Willem Jan van Wijtvliet27歲，母親Dame Ada Ijsbrandsdr van Wijtvliet van der Made26歲。她於大約1247年與Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven在荷蘭布拉班特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1304年7月15日在荷蘭布拉班特享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet于1226年10月10日出生在荷兰努-布拉班特貝可爾时，她的父亲Heer Willem Jan van Wijtvliet27岁，母亲Dame Ada Ijsbrandsdr van Wijtvliet van der Made26岁。她于大约1247年与Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven在荷兰布拉班特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1304年7月15日在荷兰布拉班特享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrudis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Willem
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet was born on 10 October 1226, in Berkel, North Brabant, Netherlands, her father, Heer Willem Jan van Wijtvliet, was 27 and her mother, Dame Ada Ijsbrandsdr van Wijtvliet van der Made, was 26. She married Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven about 1247, in Brabant, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 15 July 1304, in Brabant, Netherlands, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet est née le 10 octobre 1226, à Berkel, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Heer Willem Jan van Wijtvliet, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Dame Ada Ijsbrandsdr van Wijtvliet van der Made, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven environ 1247, à Brabant, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 juillet 1304, à Brabant, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet am 10. Oktober 1226 in Berkel, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heer Willem Jan van Wijtvliet 27 und ihre Mutter Dame Ada Ijsbrandsdr van Wijtvliet van der Made 26. Sie hat um 1247 in Brabant, Niederlande Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Juli 1304 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Brabant, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet è nata il il 10 ottobre 1226 nel Berkel, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Heer Willem Jan van Wijtvliet, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Dame Ada Ijsbrandsdr van Wijtvliet van der Made, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven circa 1247, nel Brabant, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 luglio 1304, nel Brabant, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvlietが1226年10月10日にオランダノオルド-ブラバントバーケルで生まれた時，父Heer Willem Jan van Wijtvlietは27歳，母Dame Ada Ijsbrandsdr van Wijtvliet van der Madeは26歳であった。約1247年にオランダブラバントでRidder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechovenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1304年7月15日にオランダブラバントで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet(이)가 1226년 10월 10일 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 버클에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heer Willem Jan van Wijtvliet(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dame Ada Ijsbrandsdr van Wijtvliet van der Made(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1247년 네덜란드 브라반트에서 Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1304년 7월 15일 네덜란드 브라반트에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet nasceu em 10 de outubro de 1226, em Berkel, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Heer Willem Jan van Wijtvliet, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Dame Ada Ijsbrandsdr van Wijtvliet van der Made, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven aproximadamente 1247, em Brabant, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de julho de 1304, em Brabant, Países Baixos, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet родилась 10 октября 1226 г. в местности биркел, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Heer Willem Jan van Wijtvliet было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Ada Ijsbrandsdr van Wijtvliet van der Made, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven около 1247 г. в местности брабант, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 15 июля 1304 г. в местности брабант, Нидерланды в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet nació el 10 de octubre de 1226, en Berkel, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, su papá, Heer Willem Jan van Wijtvliet, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Dame Ada Ijsbrandsdr van Wijtvliet van der Made, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven aproximadamente 1247, en Brabant, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de julio de 1304, en Brabant, Países Bajos, a la edad de 77 años.
